text: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding day arrives with Madison Square Garden under tight security - CBS News
fullText: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are expected to welcome around 1,000 guests at Madison Square Garden to celebrate their wedding, sources say.

text: Mexico vs. England at World Cup to kick-off early due to risk of weather - sources - ESPN
fullText: The World Cup match between Mexico and England is likely to have its kickoff time changed due to the risk of weather disruption including flooding, sources told ESPN.

text: Nearly half of Americans surveyed don't know what America 250 commemorates - NPR
fullText: A new national poll reveals a striking paradox in public sentiment ahead of America's 250th anniversary: a disconnect between Americans' strong patriotic pride and their lack of civic knowledge.

text: Months after U.S. and Israeli strikes, Iran readies massive funeral for Khamenei - NBC News
fullText: Four months after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in U.S.-Israeli strikes, Iran is preparing for a massive multi-day funeral. It’s a calculated move by the regime to project strength and unity during a shaky peace deal with the U.S.

text: More than 60 North Carolina cases tied to parasite behind 'explosive diarrhea' - WRAL
fullText: North Carolina is dealing with a rise in Cyclospora cases, a microscopic parasite known for unpleasant gastrointestinal symptoms, including "explosive diarrhea."

text: Great American State Fair Postponed Due To Extreme Heat In D.C. - Deadline
fullText: The Great American State Fair is shutting down until 5 pm today due to extreme temperatures in Washington, D.C., organizers announced Friday.

text: Rescue mission launches to save NASA telescope that’s falling back to Earth - AP News

text: France’s Thales to Take Hit After Germany Scraps Frigate Program - WSJ
Mamdani offers a contrast to Trump’s vision for America in a 250th anniversary address - NBC News
fullText: In a speech marking America’s 250th anniversary, New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani rejected President Donald Trump’s view of the nation, and especially its immigrants, without naming him directly.

text: Dolly Parton asks Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce for their firstborn child in thank-you video: 'One special baby' - Entertainment Weekly
fullText: Dolly Parton asked Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce if she could have their firstborn child in a thank-you video for their $2 million donation to her Imagination Library charity ahead of their wedding.

text: GFL Environmental Weighs Take-Private Amid Interest From Buyout Firms - Bloomberg.com
fullText: GFL Environmental Inc. is considering a potential take-private transaction after drawing interest from buyout firms, people familiar with the matter said.
